message:
fix(codegen): Multiple fixes for core2 test compatibility

- Fix exprToValue var_renames for closure captures (__m*_c_* pattern)
- Add exception for anytype param .init() calls to preserve native types
- Add stringContains/stringNotContains for substring search (assertIn)
- Fix dunder attribute access (skip demangling for __func__, __wrapped__)
- Fix memory corruption in closure param renames (arena dupe values)
- Fix anytype param calls to use .init() pattern for type construction

Now passing: flufl, longexp, finalization, complex (4 tests)
